decision_commentary: All required sections present in both Spanish and English: scope_summary (bilingual), budget_detail (bilingual with all phase amounts and payment schedule), timeline_phases (6 phases with durations and milestones), process_narrative (bilingual). No placeholder text. No internal notes or agent commentary. Budget matches Bruno's figures exactly (USD 90,000 total; M1 36K, M2 27K, M3 27K; phase breakdown matches budget.json line items). SOW section reflects Tomás's approved scope exactly — all 6 phases mentioned with correct deliverable categories and SEMARNAT note. Proposal is client-ready — professional, warm, design-engaged language. State sync scored 4 — Asana GID 1213707404161746 confirmed in state.json. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
